overall.description: A static first-person view from a bed inside a cyberpunk apartment overlooking a futuristic cityscape at dawn. Flying vehicles occasionally pass by the large window. The scene is from a video game featuring high-fidelity graphics with dramatic blue-hour lighting and detailed interior elements.

segments.scene_description: A static view from a cyberpunk apartment bedroom looking out at a futuristic city at dawn. The camera remains fixed on the unmade bed and large panoramic window, capturing the blue and orange gradient sky. Flying vehicles occasionally traverse the view outside, passing between the camera and the distant skyscrapers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a cyberpunk bedroom that captures the quiet transition of a futuristic city at dawn. It begins with a fixed gaze across an unmade bed toward a large panoramic window, where the sky displays a deep blue and orange gradient. As the camera lingers, the stillness of the interior is contrasted by the movement outside, where flying vehicles glide between the window and the distant skyscrapers. The scene remains focused on this intersection of domestic intimacy and urban scale, finally settling on the atmospheric glow of the waking metropolis.
